title: NL001
treatment_protocol_ch1: Tissue samples were stored in RNAlater (Thermo Fisher Scientific) at -80°C immediately after dissected.
extract_protocol_ch1: Total RNA was extracted from tissue specimens by using RNeasy Protect Mini Kit (QIAGEN). Contaminating DNA was removed by digestion with RNase-Free DNase Set (QIAGEN). The RNA Integrity Number (RIN) of all the samples was confirmed to be greated than 7.0 by using 2100 Bioanalyzer (Agilent Technologies).
label_protocol_ch1: Amplified RNA was prepared by using 3' IVT Express Kit (Affymetrix).
hyb_protocol: Hybridization and signal detection of HG-U133 Plus 2.0 arrays (Affymetrix) were performed following the manufacturer's instruction by using the Affymetrix Fluidics Station 450.
scan_protocol: GeneChips were scanned with Affymetrix GeneChip Scanner 3000.
data_processing: The microarray data of 152 tumorous and 91 adjacent liver tissues from HCC patients as well as 14 normal liver were normalized by robust multichip analysis (RMA) using affy package in R/Bioconductor.

extract_protocol_ch1: Total RNA was extracted from tissue specimens by using RNeasy Protect Mini Kit (QIAGEN). Contaminating DNA was removed by digestion with RNase-Free DNase Set (QIAGEN). The RNA Integrity Number (RIN) of all the samples was confirmed to be greated than 7.0 by using 2100 Bioanalyzer (Agilent Technologies).
label_protocol_ch1: Amplified RNA was prepared by using 3' IVT Express Kit (Affymetrix).
hyb_protocol: Hybridization and signal detection of HG-U133 Plus 2.0 arrays (Affymetrix) were performed following the manufacturer's instruction by using the Affymetrix Fluidics Station 450.
scan_protocol: GeneChips were scanned with Affymetrix GeneChip Scanner 3000.
data_processing: The microarray data of 152 tumorous and 91 adjacent liver tissues from HCC patients as well as 14 normal liver were normalized by robust multichip analysis (RMA) using affy package in R/Bioconductor.

extract_protocol_ch1: Total RNA was extracted from tissue specimens by using RNeasy Protect Mini Kit (QIAGEN). Contaminating DNA was removed by digestion with RNase-Free DNase Set (QIAGEN). The RNA Integrity Number (RIN) of all the samples was confirmed to be greated than 7.0 by using 2100 Bioanalyzer (Agilent Technologies).
label_protocol_ch1: Amplified RNA was prepared by using 3' IVT Express Kit (Affymetrix).
hyb_protocol: Hybridization and signal detection of HG-U133 Plus 2.0 arrays (Affymetrix) were performed following the manufacturer's instruction by using the Affymetrix Fluidics Station 450.
scan_protocol: GeneChips were scanned with Affymetrix GeneChip Scanner 3000.
data_processing: The microarray data of 152 tumorous and 91 adjacent liver tissues from HCC patients as well as 14 normal liver were normalized by robust multichip analysis (RMA) using affy package in R/Bioconductor.

extract_protocol_ch1: Total RNA was extracted from tissue specimens by using RNeasy Protect Mini Kit (QIAGEN). Contaminating DNA was removed by digestion with RNase-Free DNase Set (QIAGEN). The RNA Integrity Number (RIN) of all the samples was confirmed to be greated than 7.0 by using 2100 Bioanalyzer (Agilent Technologies).
label_protocol_ch1: Amplified RNA was prepared by using 3' IVT Express Kit (Affymetrix).
hyb_protocol: Hybridization and signal detection of HG-U133 Plus 2.0 arrays (Affymetrix) were performed following the manufacturer's instruction by using the Affymetrix Fluidics Station 450.
scan_protocol: GeneChips were scanned with Affymetrix GeneChip Scanner 3000.
data_processing: The microarray data of 152 tumorous and 91 adjacent liver tissues from HCC patients as well as 14 normal liver were normalized by robust multichip analysis (RMA) using affy package in R/Bioconductor.

extract_protocol_ch1: Total RNA was extracted from tissue specimens by using RNeasy Protect Mini Kit (QIAGEN). Contaminating DNA was removed by digestion with RNase-Free DNase Set (QIAGEN). The RNA Integrity Number (RIN) of all the samples was confirmed to be greated than 7.0 by using 2100 Bioanalyzer (Agilent Technologies).
label_protocol_ch1: Amplified RNA was prepared by using 3' IVT Express Kit (Affymetrix).
hyb_protocol: Hybridization and signal detection of HG-U133 Plus 2.0 arrays (Affymetrix) were performed following the manufacturer's instruction by using the Affymetrix Fluidics Station 450.
scan_protocol: GeneChips were scanned with Affymetrix GeneChip Scanner 3000.
data_processing: The microarray data of 152 tumorous and 91 adjacent liver tissues from HCC patients as well as 14 normal liver were normalized by robust multichip analysis (RMA) using affy package in R/Bioconductor.

extract_protocol_ch1: Total RNA was extracted from tissue specimens by using RNeasy Protect Mini Kit (QIAGEN). Contaminating DNA was removed by digestion with RNase-Free DNase Set (QIAGEN). The RNA Integrity Number (RIN) of all the samples was confirmed to be greated than 7.0 by using 2100 Bioanalyzer (Agilent Technologies).
label_protocol_ch1: Amplified RNA was prepared by using 3' IVT Express Kit (Affymetrix).
hyb_protocol: Hybridization and signal detection of HG-U133 Plus 2.0 arrays (Affymetrix) were performed following the manufacturer's instruction by using the Affymetrix Fluidics Station 450.
scan_protocol: GeneChips were scanned with Affymetrix GeneChip Scanner 3000.
data_processing: The microarray data of 152 tumorous and 91 adjacent liver tissues from HCC patients as well as 14 normal liver were normalized by robust multichip analysis (RMA) using affy package in R/Bioconductor.

extract_protocol_ch1: Total RNA was extracted from tissue specimens by using RNeasy Protect Mini Kit (QIAGEN). Contaminating DNA was removed by digestion with RNase-Free DNase Set (QIAGEN). The RNA Integrity Number (RIN) of all the samples was confirmed to be greated than 7.0 by using 2100 Bioanalyzer (Agilent Technologies).
label_protocol_ch1: Amplified RNA was prepared by using 3' IVT Express Kit (Affymetrix).
hyb_protocol: Hybridization and signal detection of HG-U133 Plus 2.0 arrays (Affymetrix) were performed following the manufacturer's instruction by using the Affymetrix Fluidics Station 450.
scan_protocol: GeneChips were scanned with Affymetrix GeneChip Scanner 3000.
data_processing: The microarray data of 152 tumorous and 91 adjacent liver tissues from HCC patients as well as 14 normal liver were normalized by robust multichip analysis (RMA) using affy package in R/Bioconductor.
